buildCommand: python3 -m venv /tmp/venv && /tmp/venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && /tmp/venv/bin/pip install -e . mkdocs mkdocs-material pymdown-extensions && /tmp/venv/bin/python -m sploink.architecture --workflow parallel_dag --out docs/architecture.html --no-open && /tmp/venv/bin/python -m sploink.dashboard --results-dir bench/results --out docs/dashboard.html --no-open && /tmp/venv/bin/mkdocs build --site-dir public
